body.u: My daughter’s son came around to the home, bordbored and nothing to do, he was meant to be at school, but on the odd day would decided to come around and see me, this was his excuse. I suppose this was the time it all started to come back to me. Being young again. At my grandsonsgrandson's age of sixteen years old.

There I was walking out of the school gates for the last time. Out into the whole to find a job and start in the working class. It took a few weeks writing letters going for interviews and so on, mum would tell me not to worry about it a job would come along soon. But you do worry, anyway a few weeks passed and a job did come along, working in a shop dealing with all sort of different things, it may not seem much but I enjoyed it, I was meeting people and generally enjoying myself. Years passed and after working myself up, I decided I needed a change away from the Island so I moved, up to Wales where my sister had moved soon after she got married. I found the place an exciting place to live, I found myself digs and within a short time was settled down in a nice job, again I was meeting people and at the same time was feeling homesick.
This was so to be overcome when I met Steve my husband. I left my job after two years of marriage to start a family, our family consisted of one girlsgirl and twin boys it was just right.

After the family grew up I tried to get myself back to my job, but could not. The job situation was getting to be a big problem in the whole world, tele, newspaper, etc all kept going on and on about it. Finally after months of trying I landed myself in a paper factory the wages good and the company of people was welcomed.

More I stayed until I was fifty-five and then had to give up work because of an operation I had to have, and since then I have been a housewife, and seeing the pleasure of the grandchildren growing up. But worry about them {facing?} in world.
